patterns.label: Azure DevOps Work-Item Notification Triage
patterns.llmRationale: 30+ ADO notifications/week processed by PM as subscriber. Rule-based classification by work-item type (Bug/Task/Requirement/Epic), workstream, and urgency. SATURATED at 1,248 occ. Foundational infrastructure candidate.

patterns.label: Inbound Eval Strategy & Expert Coaching (Teams Q&A)
patterns.llmRationale: PM is de facto eval expert for field engineers, PMs, and designers. 10+ Teams pings/week on eval depth, metrics (groundedness, tool_call_accuracy, Compare Meaning), rubrics, and timing. RISING as external sessions scale. CRITICAL BSI - PM sole DRI for 8+ request types across 46 cycles.

patterns.label: Loop Meeting Notes & Action Item Capture
patterns.llmRationale: PM creates Loop meeting notes with consistent structure: Agenda -> Decisions -> Action Items with owners -> Follow-up tasks. Cross-confirmed via meeting + document + Teams. Stable institutional pattern and chain head for meeting-to-async-workflow pipeline.

patterns.label: Weekly Status Report Generation (Parallel Team Duplication)
patterns.llmRationale: Weekly done/next/blockers updates, bi-weekly newsletters, Cape Day slides, LT summaries all created independently by team members. RISING as CAPE visibility increases. 5-format duplication gap confirmed in meeting transcripts.

patterns.label: External Partner & Customer Eval Sessions (50+ Domains)
patterns.llmRationale: PM leads 6+ external sessions/week with SIs across 50+ domains (Accenture 2h, HCL 1h50m, KPMG groups 3h, EY 55m, Avanade 1h, Cognizant 1h). ~13 hrs/week. Pre-session packs and post-session recaps are high-value targets. RISING as SI program scales.

patterns.label: Eval Tooling CLI & Implementation Troubleshooting
patterns.llmRationale: PM resolves repeated CLI, CSV import/export, feature-flag availability, and tool_call_accuracy flag questions. Known-answer questions codifiable into an interactive FAQ or troubleshooter skill.

patterns.label: VOC & Cross-Org DRI Navigation Assistance
patterns.llmRationale: PM acts as informal router between field engineers, MCS Analytics, and PG eval teams. Repeated who-owns-this and contact recommendation requests. PM functioning as a human API gateway. High automation potential via org-knowledge skill.

patterns.label: EvalCon Content Planning & Positioning (Event Prep)
patterns.llmRationale: Recurring event-prep: framing blockers, content strategy, submission deadlines, leadership alignment for EvalCon. RISING as event approaches. General event-prep skill applicable beyond EvalCon.

patterns.label: Technical Artifact Distribution via Teams (Repos, ZIPs, Specs)
patterns.llmRationale: PM shares GitHub repos, ZIPs, YAML, markdown, Loop components via Teams. 8+ shares/week. Context packaging and discoverability are the real gaps, not the sharing act itself.

patterns.label: Agent Architecture & MCP/Skills Scoping Discussions
patterns.llmRationale: Recurring scoping on MCP servers, CLI vs UI, WorkIQ constraints, skill-creator/skill-detector PRDs, Copilot Studio vs SDK. RISING as MCP ecosystem evolves rapidly. High strategic value for architectural decision support.

patterns.label: Parallel Eval Enablement Deck Creation (Team-Wide Duplication)
patterns.llmRationale: Multiple team members independently create eval intro decks and playbooks (CAPE_EVALs_Playbook_v5, TFM Agent Evals, eval convo decks). Meetings explicitly call out multiple floating versions. Template scaffolder unifies output.

patterns.label: Daily Personal Day-Prep Planning Page (Morning Ritual)
patterns.llmRationale: PM creates structured daily planning pages with 5x/week morning cadence. A skill ingesting calendar, unread emails, Teams pings, and open Loop action items could produce a prioritized day brief in seconds.

patterns.label: CAPE & Evals Leadership Strategy Thread Synthesis
patterns.llmRationale: Long-form cross-org strategy threads (Project Crucible, evals-first mindset, playbooks, EvalCon) require PM to synthesize dense content and compose responses for large audiences. Summary + response-draft skill preserves PM voice at scale.

patterns.label: Security & Compliance Alert Review (Office365/Purview)
patterns.llmRationale: 7 distinct Purview/compliance alerts/week (file blocked, admin elevated, Loop workspace notices). High automation via rule-based classification: actionable vs informational, with suggested remediation steps.

patterns.label: Recurring Weekly Sync Meeting Cadence (4+ Distinct Series)
patterns.llmRationale: PM attends 4 distinct weekly syncs (Evals Tue 3:05, Crucible Mon 8:05, Solution Library Mon 9:05, Manager Mon 11:05), all extended through August. Agenda pre-population and post-meeting capture are automatable.

patterns.label: Skilluminator Cycle Dashboard Weekly HTML Refresh
patterns.llmRationale: The Skilluminator itself: each cycle PM ingests signals, detects patterns, and refreshes dashboard HTML. Self-referential meta-pattern. The skill being built IS this skill. Consistent weekly cadence with structured artifact output.

patterns.label: Agent Eval Sets Template Maintenance (Living Excel Tracker)
patterns.llmRationale: Agent Eval Sets_Template.xlsx shared repeatedly (Nov 2025 to Mar 2026) as a living tracker for eval scenario coverage, quality bars, and customer variants. Skill candidate overlaps with eval-enablement-deck-creation; consolidation recommended.

patterns.label: Camp AIR Immersive Training & Hackathon Coordination
patterns.llmRationale: Multi-day Camp AIR events (~9 hrs/day, Mon+Tue) with standups, EOD debriefs, hackathon artifacts, CRM/Dataverse sessions, and agentic workflow workshops. RISING as CAPE scales training programs. High coordination overhead with repeatable structure.

patterns.label: High-Urgency Escalation Email Authoring
patterns.llmRationale: PM composes direct high-urgency escalation emails when blockers arise. Distinct tonal shift from normal comms. Template+context skill compresses authoring time significantly.

patterns.label: Stakeholder 1:1 Check-In Preparation & Follow-Up (6/week)
patterns.llmRationale: 6 weekly 1:1s totaling 3h45m. Standard alignment format across diverse stakeholders. Pre-meeting prep (context brief, open items, talking points) and post-meeting capture are repeatable automation candidates.

candidateSkills.name: eval-design-advisor
candidateSkills.description: Codifies PM eval expert knowledge into a portable coaching skill. Accepts agent description, eval lifecycle stage, and use-case context. Emits recommended eval case count, metric selection (groundedness, tool_call_accuracy, Compare Meaning), rubric structure, and timing guidance. Designed to unblock the BSI bottleneck where PM is sole DRI for eval guidance across 8+ request types.
triggerExamples: How many eval cases do I need for a 3-intent agent?
Should I use keyword match or semantic grading for this scenario?
When in the agent lifecycle should evals start?
Help me design eval coverage for a declarative agent grounded in 170+ SharePoint sites
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Unblocks CRITICAL BSI score 87 - PM sole eval expert for 46 cycles. 432 occ RISING. Est. ~$130K/yr saved.

candidateSkills.name: meeting-notes-action-extractor
candidateSkills.description: Ingests meeting transcript, Loop doc, agenda, or email thread and emits: structured action items with owner+due-date, decisions log, open questions list, follow-up email draft, and optional ADO task stubs. Chain head for the meeting-to-async-workflow pipeline confirmed across 3 signal sources.
triggerExamples: Extract action items from Camp AIR standup debrief
Summarize customer eval session into Loop meeting notes
Create post-meeting recap for CAPE Architecture Call
Generate follow-up tasks from 1:1 with Engineering Lead
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Replaces ~59 hrs across 4+ roles. 184 occ stable. Est. ~$153K/yr.

candidateSkills.name: partner-eval-enablement-pack-generator
candidateSkills.description: Generates pre-session context packs, standard eval scenario libraries tailored to partner domain (CRM/Dataverse, compliance, AI platform), and post-session recap emails. Base template plus domain customization layer covering 50+ external domains.
triggerExamples: Prepare pre-session eval context pack for KPMG financial services
Generate post-session recap email for Accenture eval meeting
Create domain-customized eval scenario set for ey.com
Standardize onboarding eval artifact for new SI partner
candidateSkills.valueProposition: ~13 hrs/week of external sessions, 276 occ RISING. Highest raw time-save in dataset. Est. ~$324K/yr at scale.

candidateSkills.name: weekly-status-report-generator
candidateSkills.description: Synthesizes done/next/blockers status from Loop notes, Teams threads, email threads, and meeting recaps into standardized weekly artifacts across 5 output formats simultaneously. Resolves the parallel creation gap acknowledged in meeting transcripts.
triggerExamples: Generate this week CAPE eval status in all 5 formats
Draft bi-weekly newsletter from Loop pages and email threads
Create Cape Day slide content from project updates
Refresh weekly status across all M365 sources
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Resolves 5-format parallel creation gap across 5 team members. 152 occ RISING. Est. ~$115K/yr.

candidateSkills.name: daily-prep-briefing-generator
candidateSkills.description: Morning skill ingesting calendar, unread emails, overnight Teams pings, and open Loop action items. Emits a structured day brief: priority focus areas, per-meeting prep notes, follow-up items, and one key decision to make. Replaces the manual daily planning page ritual.
triggerExamples: Prepare my day brief for today
What are my top 3 priorities this morning?
Summarize overnight Teams and email before my 8 AM
Generate pre-meeting prep for my first 3 meetings today
candidateSkills.valueProposition: 228 occ stable, 5x/week cadence. Saves ~19 hrs/year. High daily-driver adoption potential. Low-risk first deployment with immediate personal ROI.
